problem id: 51a78467
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(3) XOR NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  10111011 -> 11100111
  01100100 -> 11011111
  01110100 -> 01011111
  11001000 -> 10111111
  11110100 -> 01011111
  10100000 -> 11111111
  00001100 -> 10011111
  00001111 -> 01000111

query: 01011111
predicted answer: 11000111
